description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a detached garage, set on a rectangular plot with a paved driveway and landscaped greenery. The main building features a light-colored facade, gabled and flat roof sections, and multiple symmetrically arranged windows with shutters. The front yard includes a driveway leading to the garage and a parked car, while the backyard has a patio area with outdoor furniture and trees. The house has a prominent arched window above the main entrance, and the entryway is accentuated by a small porch. The property is surrounded by grass, shrubs, and mature trees, giving it a welcoming residential feel. The overall design is reminiscent of Colonial Revival architecture with modern touches.
description: A two-story light-colored house with a detached garage, gabled and flat roofs, symmetrical windows, and landscaped yards. Features include a paved driveway, arched window, and a welcoming front porch.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, detached garage, and a car parked in front. The symmetrical facade and arched window above the entry are prominent.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back of the house, garage, and backyard landscaping with trees and a patio area.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the patio with outdoor furniture, large arched window, and additional landscaping details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side of the house, more trees, and the connection between the house and garage.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with an arched feature window
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with a small porch, steps, and an arched window above; flanked by symmetrical windows and minimal decorative elements.
